subcodes.first_line: O Hasan! Call to mind the time when thou didst attain unto the presence of the Countenance, when the holy glances were directed unto thee, and thou didst hearken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حسن ذکر حین الذی حضرت تلقاء الوجه و ارتدت الیک لحظات القدس و سمعت
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @thankfulness; gratitude
